chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Criminal Appeal No. 270 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of case 06-12-2023 Mr. Inayat Ali Malkani, Advocate a/w appellant. Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Awan, Addl.P.G. Complainant present in person. ====================== OMAR SIAL, J.: The present complainant confirms that he was handed back possession of the property in these proceedings. He further states that he will have no objection if the sentence already undergone by the appellant is treated as his complete sentence. He, however, requests that the appellant be told not to trouble and harass him anymore. The appellant, present in himself, undertakes and represents that he will not trouble the complainant or his family in any manner whatsoever and shall have no claim on the property in question. After hearing the preceding, learned counsel for the appellant submits that he will not argue on merits if the appellant's sentence is reduced to the one he has already undergone. Learned Additional Prosecutor General also gives his no objection to the settlement reached between the parties. Given the above development between the parties, the appeal is dismissed; however, the sentence is reduced to the one already undergone by the appellant. The appellant is on bail. His bail bonds stand cancelled and surety discharged. The surety may be returned to the person who furnished it. JUDGE
